productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Jacket
description: CompositionBlue jacket made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a mock neck, a full zippered placket, long sleeves, panel on the sides, two zippered pockets on the sides and embroidered nike swoosh on the left chestFitComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this jacket from nike. The fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you look stylish with the sharp silhouetting. Wear this jacket over jeans or track pants to keep the cold wind away.Model statisticsThe product is a size 46 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
